purpose: Bind Amazon business work to an explicit store, marketplace, brand, and product-line scope.
invariants: A project scope selects business context; it does not grant data, network, or write permission.
A source, workflow, memory, or evidence pack must reference one explicit scope when the task is scope-sensitive.
Scope values contain identifiers and labels only, never credentials or raw business rows.
A changed store, marketplace, brand, or product line creates a new scope reference.
